parameters.name: code
parameters.value: =export default async function ({ page, context }) { const msgText = context.pendingText || 'Salam!'; const log = { errors: [] }; try { await page.goto('https://login.uptaxi.ru/', { waitUntil: 'networkidle2', timeout: 60000 }); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2500)); await page.type('input[name=firm_id]', '1165', { delay: 60 }); await page.type('input[name=login]', 'MilliBot', { delay: 60 }); await page.type('input[name=password]', 'Leylusa0618', { delay: 60 }); const captchaVisible = await page.evaluate(() => { const c = document.querySelector('input[name=code]'); if (!c) return false; const r = c.getBoundingClientRect(); return r.width > 0 && r.height > 0; }); if (captchaVisible) { return { data: JSON.stringify({ stopped: 'CAPTCHA' }), type: 'application/json' }; } await page.evaluate(() => { const cb = document.querySelector('input[name=cabinet]'); if (cb) { cb.checked = true; cb.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); } }); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); await page.evaluate(() => { const btn = document.querySelector('input[type=submit], button[type=submit]'); if (btn) btn.click(); }); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 9000)); if (!page.url().includes('upphone.ru')) { return { data: JSON.stringify({ stopped: 'LOGIN_FAILED' }), type: 'application/json' }; } } catch(e) { log.errors.push('LOGIN'); return { data: JSON.stringify(log), type: 'application/json' }; } try { await page.goto('https://1165.upphone.ru:4422/web/cab/1165/operations/send-messages/create/', { waitUntil: 'networkidle2', timeout: 60000 }); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 6000)); } catch(e) { log.errors.push('NAV'); return { data: JSON.stringify(log), type: 'application/json' }; } try { await page.evaluate(() => { const selects = document.querySelectorAll('select'); for (const sel of selects) { for (const opt of sel.options) { if (opt.text.toUpperCase().includes('PUSH')) { sel.value = opt.value; sel.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); return true; } } } }); } catch(e) {} await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 4000)); let sentTo = 0; try { sentTo = await page.evaluate(() => { const jq = window.$; jq('#rows-table').jqxGrid('clearselection'); const rows = jq('#rows-table').jqxGrid('getrows'); rows.forEach(r => { jq('#rows-table').jqxGrid('selectrow', r.uid); }); return rows.length; }); } catch(e) { log.errors.push('SELECT'); } await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); try { await page.evaluate((txt) => { const ta = document.querySelector('textarea[data-name=message]'); if (ta) { ta.focus(); ta.value = txt; ta.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); ta.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); } }, msgText); } catch(e) { log.errors.push('FILL'); } await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); try { const sendBtn = await page.$('#send-message'); if (sendBtn) { await page.evaluate(e => e.click(), sendBtn); } } catch(e) { log.errors.push('SEND'); } await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 4000)); return { data: JSON.stringify({ success: true, sentTo: sentTo, errors: log.errors }), type: 'application/json' }; }

parameters.text: ={{ '✅ Göndərildi! Sürücülərə çatdı.' }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ code: "export default async function ({ page, context }) { const out = { cycles: 0, seen: [], found: [], pushed: [], errors: [] }; const ck = context.cookie; const skip = {}; (context.skipIds || []).forEach(id => { skip[String(id)] = true; }); const MIN_AGE = 10; const CYCLES = 16; const STEP = 8000; const MIN_OK = 2400; const MAX_OK = 3600; function ageSec(t) { const m = String(t || '').match(/(\\d+):(\\d+):(\\d+)/); if (!m) return 0; return Number(m[1])*3600 + Number(m[2])*60 + Number(m[3]); } function cleanAddr(s) { s = String(s || '').trim(); if (/^координаты|^\\(?\\d{1,3}\\.\\d{3}/.test(s)) return 'Bakı'; const part = s.split(',')[0].trim(); return part || 'Bakı'; } try { await page.setCookie({ name: 'cabinetUpTaxi', value: ck, domain: '1165.upphone.ru', path: '/', httpOnly: false, secure: false }); } catch (e) { out.errors.push('SETCOOKIE: ' + e.message); } let board; try { board = page; await board.goto('https://1165.upphone.ru:4422/web/cab/1165/monitoring/orders', { waitUntil: 'networkidle2', timeout: 60000 }); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 3500)); if (board.url().indexOf('login.uptaxi.ru') >= 0) { out.errors.push('COOKIE_EXPIRED'); return { data: JSON.stringify(out), type: 'application/json' }; } } catch (e) { out.errors.push('NAV: ' + e.message); return { data: JSON.stringify(out), type: 'application/json' }; } let form = null; try { form = await page.browser().newPage(); await form.setCookie({ name: 'cabinetUpTaxi', value: ck, domain: '1165.upphone.ru', path: '/', httpOnly: false, secure: false }); await form.goto('https://1165.upphone.ru:4422/web/cab/1165/operations/send-messages/create/', { waitUntil: 'networkidle2', timeout: 45000 }); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 3500)); await form.evaluate(() => { const sels = document.querySelectorAll('select'); for (const s of sels) { for (const o of s.options) { if ((o.text || '').toUpperCase().indexOf('PUSH') >= 0) { s.value = o.value; s.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); return; } } } }); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 5000)); } catch (e) { out.errors.push('FORM_INIT: ' + e.message); } async function sendPush(o) { const zone = cleanAddr(o.otkuda); const text = '🚖 ' + zone + ' · ' + o.price + ' ₼'; const rec = { id: o.id, age: ageSec(o.time), zone: zone, price: o.price, text: text }; if (!form) { out.errors.push('NO_FORM_' + o.id); return; } try { const sel = await form.evaluate(() => { const jq = window.$; jq('#rows-table').jqxGrid('clearselection'); const rr = jq('#rows-table').jqxGrid('getrows') || []; let n = 0; rr.forEach(r => { const tok = !!(r.token_firebase && String(r.token_firebase).length > 20); if (tok) { jq('#rows-table').jqxGrid('selectrow', r.uid); n++; } }); const s = jq('#rows-table').jqxGrid('getselectedrowindexes') || []; return { selected: s.length }; }); if (sel.selected < MIN_OK || sel.selected > MAX_OK) { out.errors.push('ABORT_' + o.id + '_selected' + sel.selected); return; } await form.evaluate((txt) => { const ta = document.querySelector('textarea[data-name=message]'); if (ta) { ta.focus(); ta.value = txt; ta.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); ta.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); } }, text); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 400)); const re = await form.evaluate(() => { const jq = window.$; return (jq('#rows-table').jqxGrid('getselectedrowindexes') || []).length; }); if (re < MIN_OK || re > MAX_OK) { out.errors.push('RECHECK_' + o.id + '_' + re); return; } await form.evaluate(() => { const b = document.querySelector('#send-message'); if (b) b.click(); }); rec.recipients = re; out.pushed.push(rec); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1800)); } catch (e) { out.errors.push('PUSH_' + o.id + ': ' + e.message); } } const doneThisRun = {}; for (let i = 0; i < CYCLES; i++) { out.cycles++; const cs = Date.now(); let rows = []; try { rows = await board.evaluate(() => { const jq = window.$; let r = []; try { r = jq('#orders-table').jqxGrid('getrows') || []; } catch (e) { return []; } return r.map(x => ({ id: x.id, status: x.status, pozivnoi: x.pozivnoi, time: x.time, price: x.price, otkuda: String(x.otkuda || '').slice(0, 60) })); }); } catch (e) { out.errors.push('READ' + i + ': ' + e.message); } rows.forEach(r => out.seen.push({ cycle: i, id: r.id, status: r.status, pozivnoi: r.pozivnoi, time: r.time })); const hot = rows.filter(r => String(r.status) === 'burning' && !r.pozivnoi && ageSec(r.time) >= MIN_AGE && !skip[String(r.id)] && !doneThisRun[String(r.id)]); for (const o of hot) { doneThisRun[String(o.id)] = true; out.found.push({ id: o.id, age: ageSec(o.time) }); await sendPush(o); } const el = Date.now() - cs; const w = STEP - el; if (i < CYCLES - 1 && w > 0) await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, w)); } try { if (form) await form.close(); } catch (e) {} return { data: JSON.stringify(out), type: 'application/json' }; }", context: { cookie: $json.cookie, skipIds: $json.skipIds } }) }}

options.systemMessage:
Sən Milli Taksi üçün TikTok üçün qısa video ssenariləri yazan azərbaycanlı kontent-müəllifisən.

QAYDALAR (pozma):
- Yalnız Azərbaycan dilində yaz. Kiril hərfləri qadağandır.
- Müraciət "siz" formasında, hörmətlə.
- Qısa: 2–4 cümlə, ilk saniyədə güclü hook.
- Qiymət yalnız "3.50 manatdan" kimi göstər. Komissiya haqqında HEÇ NƏ yazma.
- Endirim, aksiya, promokod TƏKLİF ETMƏ — heç vaxt. Qiymət sabitdir.
- CTA hər videoda: tətbiqi yüklə (GooglePlay & AppStore).
- Rəqəmləri yalnız verilən faktlardan götür, uydurma.

Cavabı YALNIZ bu JSON kimi ver, başqa heç nə yazma:
{"script":"...","tiktokCaption":"...","tiktokHashtags":"#Bakı #taksi #Milli","igCaption":"...","shortsTitle":"..."}

parameters.text: ={{ $json.msg }}
={{ $json.reply }}

🔴 Куки UpTaxi умер. Пульс, Сканер, Вербовщик и Sifariş встали.

Возьми свежий:
1) login.uptaxi.ru → 1165 / MilliBot / Leylusa0618
2) F12 → Console
3) document.cookie.split('; ').find(c => c.startsWith('cabinetUpTaxi=')).split('=')[1]
4) Пришли мне: куки <токен>
=🗄 Резервная копия офиса сохранена: {{ $json.wrote }} ({{ $json.size }} байт).

=✅ Ok получен. Черновик готов к рассылке водителям:
{{ $json.draft }}

parameters.jsCode: const fs=require('fs');let c='';try{const j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('/home/node/.n8n/milli/cookie.json','utf8'));c=j.cookie||'';}catch(e){}return [{json:{cookie:c}}];

parameters.jsCode: const fs=require('fs');let c='';try{const j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('/home/node/.n8n/milli/cookie.json','utf8'));c=j.cookie||'';}catch(e){}return [{json:{cookie:c}}];
